hotTopics.title: Effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity following exercise therapy for chronic conditions: an umbrella review

members.title: Effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity following exercise therapy for chronic conditions: an umbrella review
members.titleZh: 运动疗法后促进身体活动的维持干预措施对慢性病患者的有效性：一项伞形综述

members.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
members.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后加速度计测量的身体活动：一项前瞻性队列研究

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: A systematic review investigating the effect of supervised rehabilitation duration on outcomes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) to improve outcomes and reduce re-injury risk.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述直接评估了 ACLR 术后康复时长与预后的关系。这是你制定个性化康复计划、平衡功能恢复与再损伤风险的重要循证依据，特别是在向患者解释康复预期时。
items.titleZh: 监督康复时长对前交叉韧带重建术后预后的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述旨在阐明前交叉韧带重建术后监督康复的持续时间与功能预后及再损伤风险之间的关联，以期改善康复效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review directly assesses the association between rehabilitation duration and outcomes after ACLR. This provides crucial evidence for you to develop individualized rehabilitation plans, balancing functional recovery with re-injury risk, especially when discussing rehabilitation expectations with patients.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction using the contralateral knee as an internal control: a National Hospital Episode Statistics database study of 135 881 patients
items.summary: A national hospital database study of 135,881 patients found a significantly increased long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction, using the contralateral knee as an internal control.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于国家数据的研究发现，ACLr 后膝关节置换的长期风险显著增加。这坐实了 ACLr 后关节炎进展的常见性。你应在术后康复中更早地介入关节保护策略和更全面的功能训练，并与患者讨论远期关节健康的潜在风险。
items.titleZh: ACL 重建术后膝关节置换的长期风险，以对侧膝关节作为内部对照：一项针对 135,881 名患者的国家医院病案统计数据库研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 135,881 名患者的国家医院病案统计数据库研究发现，以前交叉韧带重建术后对侧膝关节作为内部对照，术后膝关节置换的长期风险显著增加。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national database study found a significantly increased long-term risk of knee replacement after ACLr. This confirms the common progression to arthritis after ACLr. You should implement joint protection strategies and more comprehensive functional training earlier in post-operative rehabilitation, and discuss the potential long-term joint health risks with patients.

items.title: Effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity following exercise therapy for chronic conditions: an umbrella review
items.summary: An umbrella review investigated the effectiveness of maintenance interventions following exercise therapy on physical activity, physical function, and health-related quality of life in people with chronic conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项伞形综述评估了慢性病患者运动疗法后维持身体活动的干预措施效果。你需要认识到，单纯的运动干预不够，必须有后续的维持策略才能确保患者长期保持身体活动水平，这对你的长期康复计划设计有直接指导意义。
items.titleZh: 运动疗法后促进身体活动的维持干预措施对慢性病患者的有效性：一项伞形综述
items.summaryZh: 一项伞形综述旨在调查运动疗法后维持干预措施对慢性病患者身体活动、身体功能、体适能和健康相关生活质量的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This umbrella review assessed the effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity after exercise therapy for chronic conditions. You need to recognize that exercise intervention alone is insufficient; subsequent maintenance strategies are crucial for patients to sustain physical activity levels long-term. This directly guides your long-term rehabilitation program design.

items.title: Phenomenological exploration of perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors in patients with knee osteoarthritis during physiotherapy rehabilitation in a low- and middle-income country.
items.summary: This qualitative study explores perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors of physiotherapy rehabilitation in knee osteoarthritis patients in a low- and middle-income country, highlighting the influence of lifestyle and contextual factors.
items.curatedReason: 本研究定性探讨了低收入国家膝骨关节炎患者对物理治疗康复的感知和体验。这类研究能帮助你了解文化和经济背景如何影响患者依从性和康复效果，从而优化你的康复方案沟通策略。
items.titleZh: 低收入国家膝骨关节炎患者物理治疗康复期间的感知、体验、促成因素和抑制因素：一项现象学探索
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了低收入和中等收入国家膝骨关节炎患者在物理治疗康复过程中对疾病和治疗的感知、体验以及促成和抑制因素，强调了生活方式和情境因素的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores perceptions and experiences of physiotherapy rehabilitation in knee OA patients in a low-income country. Understanding how cultural and economic contexts influence patient adherence can help you optimize your rehabilitation program communication strategies.

items.title: Goal attainment scaling for patients with chronic low back pain receiving physical therapist care: a feasibility and reliability study.
items.summary: This study examines the feasibility and reliability of a Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS-Back) application for chronic low back pain patients, and the nature of identified goals.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究验证了针对慢性腰痛患者的目标达成量表（GAS-Back）的可用性和可靠性。在你的临床实践中，GAS 可以更好地捕捉患者个体化的功能目标和康复进展，提高以患者为中心的评估质量。
items.titleZh: 慢性腰痛患者接受物理治疗护理的目标达成量表：一项可行性和可靠性研究
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在检验慢性腰痛患者目标达成量表（GAS-Back）的可用性和可靠性，并分析患者所设定目标的性质。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study validates the feasibility and reliability of the Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS-Back) for chronic low back pain patients. In your clinical practice, GAS can better capture individualized functional goals and rehabilitation progress, enhancing patient-centered assessment quality.

items.title: How do people with multiple sclerosis who have walking difficulties perceive participation? A qualitative analysis.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis exploring how people with multiple sclerosis and walking difficulties perceive participation, highlighting the subjective aspects of this rehabilitation concept.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入探讨了多发性硬化症（MS）步态障碍患者对“参与”的看法。这有助于你超越 ICF 框架的局限，更真实地理解 MS 患者的核心康复需求，从而设计更贴近患者主观体验的干预措施。
items.titleZh: 步态困难的多发性硬化症患者如何看待参与？一项定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项定性分析探讨了有步态困难的多发性硬化症患者如何看待“参与”这一康复概念，突出了其主观感知。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study delves into the perceptions of 'participation' among people with multiple sclerosis (MS) who have walking difficulties. It helps you understand MS patients' core rehabilitation needs beyond the ICF framework, enabling you to design interventions closer to patients' subjective experiences.

items.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study examined the association between postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) scores and length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究发现，Mini-BESTest 评分与慢性硬膜下血肿术后住院时长存在关联。Mini-BESTest 可能作为预测工具，帮助你识别术后跌倒风险较高的患者，从而更早介入平衡训练，缩短住院时间。
items.titleZh: 慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test 评分与住院时间的关系：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究探讨了慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) 评分与住院时间之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study found an association between Mini-BESTest scores and length of hospital stay after chronic subdural hematoma surgery. Mini-BESTest could serve as a predictive tool for you to identify patients at higher fall risk post-surgery, allowing earlier intervention with balance training to shorten hospital stays.

items.title: Prevalence of knee pain and factors influencing its risk in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 212 ambulatory chronic stroke survivors in Vietnam estimated the prevalence of knee pain (39.2%) and identified factors influencing its risk, such as stroke severity and gait speed.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对越南卒中患者的横断面研究揭示了步态异常与膝痛的高患病率及其相关因素。在评估卒中患者时，你需要高度关注膝痛问题，因为它可能显著限制康复进程和生活质量。
items.titleZh: 慢性卒中幸存者膝痛的患病率及其风险影响因素
items.summaryZh: 一项针对越南 212 名慢性卒中幸存者的横断面研究估计了膝痛患病率为 39.2%，并确定了包括卒中严重程度和步速在内的相关风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study in Vietnamese stroke survivors reveals a high prevalence of knee pain associated with gait alterations. When assessing stroke patients, you need to pay close attention to knee pain, as it can significantly limit rehabilitation progress and quality of life.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study investigated accelerometry-derived physical activity during the first year after Achilles tendon rupture and its relationship with patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究使用加速度计评估了跟腱断裂后一年的身体活动水平。你需要认识到，尽管患者报告的结果可能改善，但客观的身体活动水平恢复可能较慢，提醒你在康复后期继续强调和监测活动水平。
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后加速度计测量的身体活动：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究调查了跟腱断裂后一年内通过加速度计测量的身体活动情况，并探讨了其与患者报告结果的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study used accelerometry to assess physical activity levels for one year after Achilles tendon rupture. You need to recognize that while patient-reported outcomes may improve, objective physical activity levels may recover slowly, prompting you to continue emphasizing and monitoring activity levels in later-stage rehabilitation.

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: A structured review compared published postoperative rehabilitation protocols for patellar instability surgery (MPFLR, TTO, trochleoplasty) with guidance generated by selected artificial intelligence platforms.
items.curatedReason: 这项结构化综述比较了髌骨不稳手术后的康复方案与 AI 生成的指导。这为你提供了基于证据的髌骨不稳术后康复最新推荐，同时让你了解 AI 在辅助临床决策中的潜力与局限。
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳手术后康复方案：已发表推荐与 AI 生成指导的结构化综述
items.summaryZh: 一项结构化综述比较了髌骨不稳手术（如 MPFLR、TTO、滑车成形术）后的已发表康复方案与选定人工智能平台生成的指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This structured review compares rehabilitation protocols following patellar instability surgery with AI-generated guidance. It provides you with the latest evidence-based recommendations for post-operative patellar instability rehabilitation, while also shedding light on the potential and limitations of AI in clinical decision support.

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A pre-post prospective cohort pilot study evaluated a 12-week community-based power-training program for youth with cerebral palsy on goal performance, satisfaction, attainment, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究评估了社区强化抗阻训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫（CP）青少年目标表现和运动功能的影响。RIPT 对提升 CP 青少年的粗大运动功能和厌氧能力显示出积极效果，这表明你可以将此类项目纳入社区康复推荐，以实现更优的长期康复效果。
items.titleZh: 社区强化抗阻个人训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫青少年的影响：一项前瞻性队列试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列试点研究评估了为期 12 周的社区强化抗阻个人训练项目对脑瘫青少年目标表现、满意度、达成度、粗大运动功能和无氧能力的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort pilot study evaluated the effects of a community-based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) program on goal performance and motor function in youth with cerebral palsy (CP). RIPT showed positive effects on improving gross motor function and anaerobic capacity in youth with CP, suggesting you can integrate such programs into community rehabilitation recommendations for better long-term outcomes.

items.title: Sport-related trauma and motor neurone disease: a scoping review of epidemiology, mechanisms and future directions
items.summary: A scoping review mapped existing epidemiological evidence on the relationship between sport-related trauma and Motor Neurone Disease/Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (MND/ALS), identifying potential mechanistic pathways and research gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述探讨了运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病（MND/ALS）之间的关系。虽然机制尚不明确，但它提醒你在高强度、高碰撞运动中，需对头部和脊柱创伤进行更严格的风险管理和随访，尤其对有家族史的个体。
items.titleZh: 运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病：流行病学、机制及未来方向的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述梳理了运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病/肌萎缩侧索硬化症（MND/ALS）之间关系的现有流行病学证据，识别了潜在的机制途径和研究空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review explores the relationship between sport-related trauma and motor neuron disease (MND/ALS). While the mechanisms are unclear, it reminds you to implement stricter risk management and follow-up for head and spine trauma in high-intensity, contact sports, especially for individuals with a family history.

items.title: Rehabilitation Utilizing Blood Flow Restriction Following Surgical Repair of a Bankart Lesion with a Buford Complex in an Elite High School Football Player: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report details the rehabilitation of an elite high school football player with a Bankart lesion and Buford complex using blood flow restriction following surgical repair.
items.curatedReason: 本病例报告展示了精英橄榄球运动员肩关节 Bankart 损伤合并 Buford 复合体并使用血流限制训练的康复案例。虽然是单例，但对处理这类复杂肩关节不稳定患者，特别是高水平运动员，提供了有益的临床思路。
items.titleZh: 精英高中橄榄球运动员 Bankart 损伤合并 Buford 复合体手术修复后采用血流限制训练的康复：一例病例报告
items.summaryZh: 本病例报告详述了一名精英高中橄榄球运动员在 Bankart 损伤合并 Buford 复合体手术修复后，采用血流限制训练进行康复的过程。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report presents the rehabilitation of an elite high school football player with a Bankart lesion and Buford complex, utilizing blood flow restriction. While a single case, it offers valuable clinical insights for managing complex shoulder instability in high-level athletes.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Moving Forward Together. Part 5: Championing Physical Therapy Allyship and Advocacy for Indigenous Peoples With Musculoskeletal Pain.
items.summary: The fifth article in the "Moving Forward Together" series explores the role of physical therapy allyship and advocacy in improving the musculoskeletal health of Indigenous Peoples, emphasizing truth-telling and healing.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章探讨了物理治疗师在改善原住民肌肉骨骼健康方面的支持和倡导作用。这是行业实践领域的重要讨论，提醒你关注服务公平性与文化敏感性，而非直接的临床技术。
items.titleZh: 携手前行。第五部分：为原住民的肌肉骨骼疼痛疾病争取物理治疗支持和倡导
items.summaryZh: “携手前行”系列第五篇文章探讨了物理治疗师在改善原住民肌肉骨骼健康方面的支持和倡导作用，强调了真相叙述和疗愈的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article discusses the role of physical therapists in allyship and advocacy for improving musculoskeletal health among Indigenous Peoples. It's an important discussion in practice and profession, reminding you to consider equity and cultural sensitivity in your service delivery, rather than clinical techniques.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Healthcare professionals' perception of prevalence and assessment of mental ill-health in stroke patients with and without aphasia - a national survey.
items.summary: A national survey investigated healthcare professionals' perceptions of mental ill-health prevalence and assessment practices in stroke patients, with and without aphasia, in Swedish stroke care.
items.curatedReason: 这项全国性调查揭示了瑞典医疗专业人员对卒中患者（无论是否失语）心理健康问题的感知和评估现状。你需要意识到，即使是沟通障碍患者，心理健康评估也至关重要，但往往资源不足，这提示你加强多学科协作和评估工具的适应性。
items.titleZh: 医疗专业人员对伴或不伴失语症的卒中患者心理健康患病率和评估的看法：一项全国调查
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性调查研究了瑞典医疗专业人员对卒中患者（包括伴有和不伴有失语症的患者）心理健康患病率的感知和评估实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national survey reveals Swedish healthcare professionals' perceptions and assessment practices regarding mental ill-health in stroke patients, with or without aphasia. You need to recognize that mental health assessment is crucial even for patients with communication impairments, but often lacks sufficient resources. This prompts you to strengthen multidisciplinary collaboration and adaptability of assessment tools.

items.title: Exploring psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the lived experiences of psychological flexibility and its processes in adults with spinal cord injury (SCI), noting its link to better mental health.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究探讨了脊髓损伤（SCI）成人心理灵活性的过程。理解这些个体经验能帮助你在康复中更好地融入以价值观为导向的干预策略，提升患者的心理适应能力和生活质量。
items.titleZh: 探讨脊髓损伤成人心理灵活性的过程：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了脊髓损伤（SCI）成人心理灵活性及其过程的亲身经历，指出其与更好的心理健康相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores the processes of psychological flexibility in adults with spinal cord injury (SCI). Understanding these individual experiences can help you better integrate value-driven intervention strategies into rehabilitation, enhancing patients' psychological resilience and quality of life.

items.title: Early Neuromuscular and Co-activation Patterns After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction In Males: A Case-control Exploratory Feasibility Study.
items.summary: An exploratory feasibility study investigated early (within ~2 weeks) neuromuscular and co-activation patterns in males after ACLR, highlighting quadriceps inhibition and excessive hamstring co-activation as barriers to recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性可行性研究关注 ACLR 术后早期的神经肌肉和协同激活模式。尽管样本量小，但它强调了早期股四头肌抑制和蠖绳肌过度协同激活的挑战，提醒你在术后早期康复中，需要更精细地评估和干预这些模式。
items.titleZh: 男性前交叉韧带重建术后早期神经肌肉和协同激活模式：一项病例对照探索性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性可行性研究调查了男性前交叉韧带重建术后早期（约2周内）的神经肌肉和协同激活模式，指出股四头肌抑制和腘绳肌过度协同激活是恢复的障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory feasibility study focuses on early neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after ACLR. Although small in sample size, it highlights the challenges of early quadriceps inhibition and excessive hamstring co-activation, reminding you to meticulously assess and intervene these patterns in early postoperative rehabilitation.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: National survey of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia.
items.summary: A cross-sectional online survey (June-August 2023) described stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia, assessing service characteristics including staffing, session frequency, duration, and insurance coverage.
items.curatedReason: 这项关于印度尼西亚卒中康复服务的全国调查提供了当地服务特征的快照。如果你关注国际康复服务发展或考虑在印尼执业，这份报告为你了解当地的资源、频率和覆盖情况提供了基础信息。
items.titleZh: 印度尼西亚卒中康复服务全国调查
items.summaryZh: 一项于 2023 年 6 月至 8 月进行的在线横断面调查，描述了印度尼西亚的卒中康复服务，评估了人员配置、治疗频率、时长和保险覆盖等服务特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national survey of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia provides a snapshot of local service characteristics. If you're interested in international rehabilitation service development or considering practice in Indonesia, this report offers foundational information on local resources, frequency, and coverage.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared the efficacy of a Lung Boost Trainer versus an incentive spirometer on pulmonary function in post-COVID hemiplegic cerebral palsy children.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 比较了 Lung Boost Trainer 和吸气式肺活量计对新冠后偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响。虽然特定于脑瘫儿童，但其研究方法和对呼吸肌训练的关注，对你理解不同呼吸训练设备的疗效差异有参考价值。
items.titleZh: 肺部增强训练器与吸气式肺活量计对新冠后偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了肺部增强训练器与吸气式肺活量计对新冠后偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared the effects of the Lung Boost Trainer versus incentive spirometry on pulmonary function in post-COVID hemiplegic cerebral palsy children. Although specific to children with CP, its methodology and focus on respiratory muscle training are valuable for you to understand the efficacy differences among various respiratory training devices.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Evolving Demographics and Injury Characteristics of US Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury, 1972-2024.
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis of the Spinal Cord Injury Model Systems database (1972-2024) examined the demographic and injury characteristics of 37,866 new traumatic spinal cord injury cases in the United States.
items.curatedReason: 这项分析回顾了美国创伤性脊髓损伤（tSCI）的演变趋势。虽然不能直接改变你的临床手法，但了解 tSCI 人群的年龄、损伤原因等人口学变化，能帮助你预判未来康复服务的需求和资源分配，影响你的执业规划。
items.titleZh: 1972-2024 年美国创伤性脊髓损伤患者人口统计学和损伤特征的演变
items.summaryZh: 一项对 1972-2024 年脊髓损伤模型系统数据库的横断面分析，考察了美国 37,866 例新增创伤性脊髓损伤患者的人口统计学和损伤特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analysis reviews the evolving trends of traumatic spinal cord injury (tSCI) in the US. While it doesn't directly change your clinical techniques, understanding demographic shifts in tSCI populations, such as age and injury causes, can help you anticipate future rehabilitation service needs and resource allocation, impacting your practice planning.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Retraction Note: The effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization on pain and functional disability in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome; a randomized control clinical trial.
items.summary: Retraction notice for a randomized controlled clinical trial on the effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization on pain and functional disability in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这是一篇撤稿声明，原论文关于肩峰撞击综合征物理治疗与神经松动术效果的随机对照试验已被撤回。这意味着你不能再引用该研究的结论，提醒你在查阅文献时留意撤稿信息。
items.titleZh: 撤稿声明：常规物理治疗结合或不结合神经松动术对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛和功能障碍的疗效；一项随机对照临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一篇关于常规物理治疗结合或不结合神经松动术对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛和功能障碍疗效的随机对照临床试验已撤稿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a retraction notice for a randomized controlled trial on the effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization for shoulder impingement syndrome. This means you cannot cite its conclusions and should be aware of retraction information when reviewing literature.

items.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis confirmed the effectiveness of exercise-based interventions on pain and function for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults.
items.curatedReason: 针对中老年肩袖相关性肩痛，这项系统综述和荟萃分析证实了运动干预能有效改善疼痛和功能。这进一步强化了运动疗法作为肩袖相关疼痛一线治疗的证据基础，在临床实践中应优先推荐并提供个性化运动方案。
items.titleZh: 运动干预对中老年肩袖相关性肩痛的效果：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析证实，运动干预能有效改善中老年肩袖相关性肩痛的疼痛和功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms that exercise interventions effectively improve pain and function in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain. This further strengthens the evidence base for exercise therapy as a first-line treatment for rotator cuff-related pain; you should prioritize recommending and providing personalized exercise programs in clinical practice.

items.title: Diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test in individuals with stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) cutoff values for individuals with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了BBS和Mini-BESTest在卒中患者中的诊断和预后准确性。这对于你选择评估卒中患者平衡功能的工具至关重要，它提供了基于证据的参考标准，让你能更精准地判断患者的跌倒风险和功能恢复潜力。
items.titleZh: Berg平衡量表和Mini-BESTest在卒中患者诊断和预后准确性：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析研究了Berg平衡量表（BBS）和Mini-BESTest在卒中患者中诊断和预后准确性的截断值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluates the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) in stroke patients. This is crucial for your choice of tools to assess balance function in stroke patients, providing evidence-based reference standards that enable more precise assessment of fall risk and functional recovery potential.

items.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.
items.summary: A retrospective comparative effectiveness cohort study examined the impact of inpatient rehabilitation facilities versus skilled nursing facilities on "home time" (a proxy for functional recovery) among acute stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项利用急性卒中登记数据进行的比较有效性研究表明，住院康复机构（IRFs）与专业护理机构（SNFs）在卒中患者功能恢复（以“居家时间”衡量）方面可能存在差异。你应理解不同康复设置的优劣，并结合患者具体情况和支付能力，为患者推荐最合适的康复路径，最大化其居家恢复潜力。
items.titleZh: 利用急性卒中登记数据比较住院康复与专业护理机构康复的有效性
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性比较有效性队列研究，利用急性卒中登记数据，评估了住院康复机构与专业护理机构康复对急性卒中患者“居家时间”（功能恢复的替代指标）的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This comparative effectiveness study, using acute stroke registry data, suggests potential differences in functional recovery (measured by "home time") between Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) and Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs) for stroke patients. You should understand the pros and cons of different rehabilitation settings and recommend the most suitable path for patients, considering their specific condition and payment capabilities, to maximize their home recovery potential.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.

items.title: Dry needling and muscle mechanical properties in myofascial trigger points: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the effects of dry needling on myofascial mechanical properties in adults with active or latent myofascial trigger points.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析探讨了干针疗法对肌筋膜触发点机械特性的影响。它为你提供了干针作为治疗手段的证据基础，特别是针对改变肌肉机械特性方面。在临床实践中，你可以更有信心地将干针应用于目标触发点，但仍需结合整体治疗方案。
items.titleZh: 干针疗法与肌筋膜触发点肌肉机械特性：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了干针疗法对活动性或潜在肌筋膜触发点成年患者肌筋膜机械特性的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis explores the effects of dry needling on the mechanical properties of myofascial trigger points. It provides you with an evidence base for dry needling as a treatment modality, particularly in altering muscle mechanical properties. In clinical practice, you can apply dry needling to target trigger points with more confidence, but it should still be integrated into a holistic treatment plan.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review found no significant differences in functional outcomes or complications between early (≤14 days) and delayed (≥28 days) postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty.
items.curatedReason: 关于反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后康复，这项系统综述发现早期康复（≤14天）与传统康复（≥28天）在功能结果和并发症上没有显著差异。这提示你可以根据患者个体情况和康复资源灵活安排康复启动时机，不必强制性延迟。
items.titleZh: 反式全肩关节置换术后早期与传统康复：功能结局和并发症的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述发现，反式全肩关节置换术后早期（≤14天）与传统（≥28天）康复在功能结局和并发症方面没有显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review suggests that early rehabilitation (≤14 days) versus conventional rehabilitation (≥28 days) after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) shows no significant differences in functional outcomes or complications. This allows you flexibility in timing rehabilitation initiation based on individual patient needs and resource availability, rather than strictly adhering to delayed protocols.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches on pain and function in patients with chronic pain in primary care: a retrospective observational study.
items.summary: A retrospective observational study found no significant differences in pain and function outcomes among supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches for chronic pain patients in primary care.
items.curatedReason: 关于慢性疼痛的康复，这项回顾性研究发现个体、团体和混合理疗方案在主要疼痛和功能结局上没有显著差异。这意味着在资源有限或患者偏好团体环境时，团体理疗是一个同样有效的选项，你可以根据临床情境和患者需求灵活选择。
items.titleZh: 初级保健中个体、团体及混合物理治疗对慢性疼痛患者疼痛和功能的比较效果：回顾性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性观察研究发现，初级保健中个体、团体和混合物理治疗方案在慢性疼痛患者的疼痛和功能结局上无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic pain rehabilitation, this retrospective study found no significant differences in primary pain and functional outcomes across individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches. This means group physiotherapy is an equally effective option when resources are limited or patients prefer a group setting; you can flexibly choose based on clinical context and patient needs.

items.title: Physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to the implementation of high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain: a scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies.
items.summary: A scoping review of 37 studies identified physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to implementing high-value physiotherapy, such as exercise, for chronic pain.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述明确指出了物理治疗师在慢性疼痛高价值理疗实施中的障碍和促成因素。你需要审视自身的临床实践，评估是否存在过度依赖低价值治疗（如手法）而忽视高价值治疗（如运动）的情况，并主动寻求克服障碍、采纳循证实践的方法。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在慢性疼痛高价值理疗实施中的障碍和促成因素：37项研究的范围综述与叙述性综合
items.summaryZh: 一项对37项研究的范围综述确定了物理治疗师在实施慢性疼痛高价值理疗（如运动）方面的障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review clearly identifies physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to implementing high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain. You need to examine your own clinical practice, assess whether there's an over-reliance on low-value treatments (e.g., manual therapy) at the expense of high-value treatments (e.g., exercise), and actively seek ways to overcome barriers and adopt evidence-based practices.

items.title: Barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China: A qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among community-dwelling adults with spinal cord injury in China, using the COM-B model.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对中国脊髓损伤（SCI）患者休闲时间体育活动障碍和促成因素的定性研究，揭示了文化和环境背景对康复依从性的影响。作为临床医生，你需要理解并考虑这些社会心理因素，才能更好地制定个性化的康复计划，提高患者依从性和活动水平。
items.titleZh: 中国脊髓损伤患者休闲时间体育活动的障碍与促成因素：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究采用COM-B模型，探讨了中国社区脊髓损伤成年人休闲时间体育活动的障碍与促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study on barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) in China reveals the impact of cultural and environmental contexts on rehabilitation adherence. As a clinician, you need to understand and consider these psychosocial factors to better formulate personalized rehabilitation plans and improve patient adherence and activity levels.

items.title: Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) to Recover Arm Activity After Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-blind, randomized, sham-controlled trial evaluated the feasibility and effects of a home-based wearable myoelectric interface (MINT) on arm activity in moderately-to-severely impaired chronic stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验评估了可穿戴肌电界面（MINT）在慢性卒中患者手臂功能恢复中的可行性及效果。对于中度至重度上肢功能障碍的患者，MINT作为一种居家治疗方案，有望改善异常肌肉协同激活。你可以关注这类技术进展，未来将其纳入居家康复指导。
items.titleZh: 可穿戴肌电界面（MINT）在卒中后手臂活动恢复中的应用：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲、随机、假对照试验评估了居家可穿戴肌电界面（MINT）在中度至重度慢性卒中患者手臂活动恢复中的可行性和效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial evaluated the feasibility and effects of a wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) in restoring arm activity after stroke. For patients with moderate-to-severe upper limb impairment, MINT, as a home-based therapy, shows promise in reducing abnormal muscle co-activation. You can follow such technological advancements to potentially integrate them into home rehabilitation guidance in the future.
